title: dodonaea nutans
intro: Dodonaea nutans, also known as the hop bush or lemon-scented dodonaea, is a small shrub native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Dodonaea nutans include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic. Its health benefits include its use in treating colds, fever, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. Dodonaea nutans can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
